name: 2'6"x4' Washable Checkerboard Plush Accent Rug - Threshold™: Indoor Gray Medium Pile, Skid-Resistant, OEKO-TEX Certified
description:
Cover high-traffic areas in your home with this Checkerboard Plush Accent Rug from Threshold™. This rectangular accent rug showcases a neutral checkerboard design for a classic look that coordinates well with any interior decor. Made from knitted fabric with a medium pile height, this plush indoor rug adds an additional layer of comfort underfoot. The skid-resistant latex backing helps to keep the rug in place on the floor, and it can be machine washed for easy care.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
